summary: Login Bounce Bug Fix Verified - P0 bug FIXED. The login bounce issue (user redirected to auth after login) has been resolved. Tests confirm: login -> home navigation works, home page stays stable for 10+ seconds without bounce, tab navigation (Home/Predictions/Rankings/Profile) works without redirecting to login, and logout redirects correctly to auth page. Fix applied: added `const didLogout = await handleAuthError(e); if (didLogout) router.replace(...)` pattern instead of unconditional router.replace(). Also fixed missing AsyncStorage import in home.tsx that was causing errors.

login_with_valid_credentials.result: User successfully navigates to /(tabs)/home after login

login_with_invalid_credentials.result: Shows error message 'Email o password errata' without crash
login_with_invalid_credentials.console_evidence: [DEBUG-1] ERRORE login: Email o password non validi

home_page_stability.test: Stay on home page for 10 seconds after login
home_page_stability.result: URL remains /home - NO BOUNCE to login
home_page_stability.details: Previously, this would cause a redirect back to /(auth)/login within 1-2 seconds

critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: handleAuthError() now correctly returns boolean to indicate if logout occurred
FIX VERIFIED: All catch blocks in tab screens now check 'const didLogout = await handleAuthError(e); if (didLogout) router.replace(...)' pattern
FIXED: Added missing AsyncStorage import in home.tsx (line 6)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login bounce P0 bug is FIXED. The handleAuthError() pattern is correctly implemented in all tab screens (home.tsx, predictions.tsx, rankings.tsx, profile.tsx, onboarding.tsx). Home.tsx needed AsyncStorage import which was added. All login/navigation flows working correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Catch blocks in tab screens were calling router.replace('/(auth)/login') unconditionally after any auth error, without checking if handleAuthError() actually performed a logout. This caused false redirects when the token was still valid in AsyncStorage but not yet in React state (race condition).
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: All catch blocks now use 'const didLogout = await handleAuthError(e); if (didLogout) router.replace(...)' pattern. handleAuthError() returns true only if it actually performed a logout (when token is NOT in AsyncStorage), preventing false redirects during state sync delays.
rca_of_the_issue.additional_fix: Added missing 'import AsyncStorage from @react-native-async-storage/async-storage' in home.tsx
